Steve Vinter

← Recipes

Chipotle Stewed Swiss Chard Bowl

with Black Beans & Spinach Salsa Verde

SERVINGS: 2(4) | COOK TIME: 30(40) MINS | SPICY 🌶 | LESS PREP ⚡

Remember to wash all produce.

Ingredients

  • 1 red onion, peeled and diced
  • 2 garlic cloves, peeled and minced
  • 4 oz green Swiss chard, leaves roughly chopped and stems thinly sliced
  • 13.4 oz black beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1 tsp chipotle morita powder 🌶
  • 6 tbsp mojo rojo sauce 🌶
  • 2 oz teen spinach, roughly chopped
  • 0.25 oz cilantro, leaves and tender stems minced
  • 1 lime, juiced
  • 8.8 oz precooked brown rice

From your kitchen

  • 1 tbsp vegetable oil
  • Salt
  • Pepper

Tools

  • Medium saucepan

Ingredients are listed for 2 servings. If you're making 4 servings, please double your ingredients by using both meal kit bags provided.

Directions

  1. Cook the beans — Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil in medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add just half the onion and just half the garlic and cook until translucent, 3 to 4 minutes. Add Swiss chard and cook until wilted, 1 to 2 minutes. Add black beans, just half the chipotle morita powder, mojo rojo, ¼ cup water, and a pinch salt and pepper. Bring to simmer and cook until greens are tender and sauce has reduced, 4 to 6 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 2 tbsp vegetable oil, ½ cup water) TIP: Add more chipotle morita if you prefer more spice.

  2. Make the salsa verde — Combine remaining red onion, remaining garlic, spinach, cilantro, and lime juice in medium bowl and season with salt and pepper to taste.

  3. Make the rice and serve — Make small tear at top of brown rice bag and microwave bag for 1 minute. Divide rice between bowls and add chipotle stewed Swiss chard and black beans. Top with spinach salsa verde. Tuck in! TIP: If you don't have a microwave, add precooked brown rice and 1 tbsp water to small saucepan over medium-high heat. Cover and steam until warmed through, 3 to 4 minutes.

Nutrition

Nutrition per serving (as packaged) Calories: 500, Fat: 8 g, Sodium: 540 mg, Carbohydrates: 81 g, Protein: 23 g.

Manufactured on equipment shared with tree nuts, peanut, sesame, wheat, soy, egg, milk, fish, and shellfish.

Recipe from Purple Carrot.
